story.text:
# • The Lexon Constitution (13 spells)
**artefact** · shared · knowledge

The harness's own law written in the language its own loop gates: TRUSTS T1–T6 and the seven seats as thirteen verified Lexon promise bundles (artifact/SPELLS/, node tools/spells_check.mjs = 13/13 CORPUS PASS). The separation bound (T2) is pure topology — no clause routes anything back to the Mage; the door (T6) is a gate no seat may self-declare. Keystone-authored and honestly labelled: not census terms, no Gap draw, the two checkers keep the authoring honest. The operator result, 'lexon your own dual agents', made a re-verifiable corpus.
